name: Loginet Japan Co., Ltd.
summary: Loginet Japan Co., Ltd. engages in logistics and transportation related businesses in Japan. It is also involved in the industrial waste/home appliance recycling/eco-businesses; international shipping; and moving/relocation services. In addition, the company offers travel services; auto, non-life, and other insurance services; car inspection and maintenance services; storage/warehouse services; and distribution processing services, as well as proprietary operating systems. Further, it produces and sells mineral water under the Yukimizu brand name. Loginet Japan Co., Ltd. was founded in 2005 and is based in Sapporo, Japan.
